localized.title: BPSC Topper Ashish Kumar Singh : Mock Interview I Drishti PCS
localized.description:
BPSC topper has been selected in Revenue Officer in the 64th BPSC final result. Drishti PCS congratulates Ashish Kumar Singh for this achievement and expresses best wishes for his bright future.
  
Drishti PCS is uploading the video of BPSC Topper Ashish Kumar Singh Mock Interview to help BPSC aspirants for their exam. Feedback provided during the mock interview is also being uploaded accordingly. This video will help a lot of students to understand the process of Interview. We will upload videos of other successful candidates in Mock Interview Playlist from time to time.

snippet.title: When Aspirants Meet Officers E02 | Featuring Varunkumar Baranwal and Ashish Kumar I IAS 2014
snippet.description:
A UPSC aspirant's biggest dream is to clear the examination and become an officer. Another dream is to get the opportunity to meet an officer so that they can pick their brain, understand different facets of UPSC preparation, get to know what life is like being an officer and so on.

Welcome to 'When Aspirants Meet Officers', a new initiative by Officers on Duty where aspirants get a chance to interact with officers who are currently on duty and ask them some important questions pertaining to UPSC preparation and roles and responsibilities of an officer and the list goes on.

In this episode, Sumit Bharatkumar Adnani and Parth Tudiya, two UPSC aspirants from different cities and backgrounds come together for this once in a lifetime opportunity to meet IAS officers Varunkumar Baranwal and Ashish Kumar from the 2014 batch.

They ask them various questions right from the challenges they faced during UPSC preparation to strategies to crack the exam. 

Watch now and take notes!

snippet.title: ASHISH, AIR 23 UPSC CSE 2021 | IAS Topper Mock Interview | Rau's IAS
snippet.description:
Congratulations to ASHISH AIR 23, UPSC CSE 2021.

We are delighted to have been a part of ASHISH, AIR 23 journey to Top Rank in UPSC CSE 2021.

The UPSC interview plays an important role in determining the rank of the candidate in the final list. Therefore, it is very crucial to score well in the UPSC interview. The moment you enter the UPSC interview room, you will be judged by a board of competent interviewers on - body language, dressing sense, communications skills, mental alertness, clarity of thought and expression, balance of judgement, intellectual and moral integrity, etc. 

Therefore, it is strongly recommended to take 2-3 UPSC Mock interviews before you appear for the actual UPSC interview. UPSC mock interviews are like rehearsals before finals, and shouldn't be missed.

Some benefits of giving Mock interviews are given below:
1. Understand the type of questions asked from DAF and Current Affairs 
2. Learn how to maintain positive body language
3. Understand how to give balanced answers
4. Most importantly, practice interacting with eminent and competent senior personalities which could be a nerve-racking experience

Rau’s IAS Study Circle provides:
* One-to-one mock interviews, as well as
* Group mock interviews akin to UPSC Interviews
 
You can learn more about our Rau’s IAS Mock Interviews from
https://rauias.com/interviews

#upsc #ashish #mockinterview #upsccse #rausias

Working for your success,
Rau’s IAS Study Circle

snippet.title: I Ashish Kumar Biography I Jai Santoshi Maa Hero I जय संतोषी माँ के हीरो की जीवनी I RJShameem Khan I
snippet.description:
Name : Ashish Kumar
Date of Birth : Unknown
First Films : Balaygras 1954 (Bengali) Phool Bane Angaare 1963 (Hindi)
Last Movie : Sant Ravidas Ki Amar Kahani 1983 (Director- Babu bhai Mistry)
Wife : Bela Bose (Dancer & Actress)
Children : Manjushree & Abhijit
Died : November 23, 2013 in Goa, India

Ashish Kumar, also known as Assis Kumar, is an actor by profession. He was a very famous director and film actor of Bengali and Hindi cinema. He has worked on several projects, but he is best remembered for his roles as the protagonist of Jai Dwarkadhish in 1977, Raja Harishchandra in 1979 and Jai Santoshi Maa in 1975. He is popular for playing the role of Lord Vishnu. Lord Shiva in many mythological movies. Ashish Kumar started his career in Bengali films before venturing into the Hindi industry (Bollywood).

He was particularly drawn to and attracted to the genre of mythology so he decided to act and direct. His golden era is marked by the sixties and seventies, in which his film, Jai Santoshi Maa, (1975) was a blockbuster and made a splash across the country along with Sholey. Ashish Kumar has a daughter and a son with his co-actor Bela Bose in a few films. She has been married to him for a long time.

    Asha - Arup Mukherjee- 1956
    Sonar Kathi- 1958
    Ratan Lal Bangali- 1960

localized.description:
Name : Ashish Kumar
Date of Birth : Unknown
First Films : Balaygras 1954 (Bengali) Phool Bane Angaare 1963 (Hindi)
Last Movie : Sant Ravidas Ki Amar Kahani 1983 (Director- Babu bhai Mistry)
Wife : Bela Bose (Dancer & Actress)
Children : Manjushree & Abhijit
Died : November 23, 2013 in Goa, India

Ashish Kumar, also known as Assis Kumar, is an actor by profession. He was a very famous director and film actor of Bengali and Hindi cinema. He has worked on several projects, but he is best remembered for his roles as the protagonist of Jai Dwarkadhish in 1977, Raja Harishchandra in 1979 and Jai Santoshi Maa in 1975. He is popular for playing the role of Lord Vishnu. Lord Shiva in many mythological movies. Ashish Kumar started his career in Bengali films before venturing into the Hindi industry (Bollywood).

He was particularly drawn to and attracted to the genre of mythology so he decided to act and direct. His golden era is marked by the sixties and seventies, in which his film, Jai Santoshi Maa, (1975) was a blockbuster and made a splash across the country along with Sholey. Ashish Kumar has a daughter and a son with his co-actor Bela Bose in a few films. She has been married to him for a long time.

snippet.title: Homecoming For Ashishkumar Chauhan As He Gets A Shot At Reviving India’s Largest Exchange’s Fortunes
snippet.description:
Ashishkumar Chauhan is set to take over as CEO of the National Stock Exchange (NSE) in November, once his term as chief of the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) ends. A mechanical engineer from the Indian Institute of Technology Bombay and alumnus of the Indian Institute of Management Calcutta, Chauhan first joined the NSE in 1993, when the bourse was being set up as a counterweight to the Bombay Stock Exchange. Chauhan's task will be cut out as it may include fixing tech issues and getting its IPO off the ground. Watch the video to know Ashishkumar Chauhan's key achievements.

snippet.description:
#motivationalvideo #coffeewithsp

नजरिया बदलो नजारे बदल जाएंगे..

snippet.title: UPPSC 2021 Topper Ashish Kumar Mishra | Mock Interview | Drishit PCS
snippet.description:
UPPSC Topper Ashish Kumar Mishra has been selected as Finance & Account Officer (Rank 4) in UPPSC 2021 final result. Drishti IAS congratulates Ashish Kumar Mishra for this achievement and expresses best wishes for his bright future.
  
Drishti PCS is uploading the video of UPPSC Topper Ashish Kumar Mishra Mock Interview to help UPPSC aspirants for their exams. Feedback provided during the mock interview is also being uploaded accordingly. This video will help a lot of students to understand the process of Interview. We will upload videos of other successful candidates in Mock Interview Playlist from time to time.


आशीष कुमार मिश्रा  ने उत्तर प्रदेश लोक सेवा आयोग द्वारा आयोजित परीक्षा में वित्त एवं लेखा अधिकारी (Rank 4) के पद पर सफलता पाई है। दृष्टि संस्थान उनकी इस उपलब्धि की हार्दिक बधाई और स्वर्णिम भविष्य की शुभकामनाएँ देता है।

उन्होंने दृष्टि संस्थान में जो मॉक इंटरव्यू दिया था उसे अपलोड किया गया है ताकि UPPSC के सभी अभ्यर्थियों को लाभ मिल सके। मॉक इंटरव्यू के दौरान दिए गए फीडबैक को भी इस वीडियो के साथ उपलब्ध कराया जा रहा है।

इस वीडियो के जरिये अभ्यर्थी इंटरव्यू की प्रक्रिया को समझ पाएंगे और अपनी तैयारी को सही दिशा में आगे बढ़ा कर सफलता की मजबूत दावेदारी पेश कर सकेंगे। मॉक इंटरव्यू प्लेलिस्ट में हम समय-समय पर अन्य सफल विद्यार्थियों के वीडियोज़ अपलोड करेंगे।

आशीष कुमार मिश्रा  ने उत्तर प्रदेश लोक सेवा आयोग द्वारा आयोजित परीक्षा में वित्त एवं लेखा अधिकारी (Rank 4) के पद पर सफलता पाई है। दृष्टि संस्थान उनकी इस उपलब्धि की हार्दिक बधाई और स्वर्णिम भविष्य की शुभकामनाएँ देता है।

उन्होंने दृष्टि संस्थान में जो मॉक इंटरव्यू दिया था उसे अपलोड किया गया है ताकि UPPSC के सभी अभ्यर्थियों को लाभ मिल सके। मॉक इंटरव्यू के दौरान दिए गए फीडबैक को भी इस वीडियो के साथ उपलब्ध कराया जा रहा है।

इस वीडियो के जरिये अभ्यर्थी इंटरव्यू की प्रक्रिया को समझ पाएंगे और अपनी तैयारी को सही दिशा में आगे बढ़ा कर सफलता की मजबूत दावेदारी पेश कर सकेंगे। मॉक इंटरव्यू प्लेलिस्ट में हम समय-समय पर अन्य सफल विद्यार्थियों के वीडियोज़ अपलोड करेंगे।

snippet.title: Mr.Ashish Kumar Mishra Rank 52 | CSE 2020 Topper's Mock Interview | NEXT IAS
snippet.description:
We extend our heartiest wishes to 𝐌𝐫. 𝐀𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐡 𝐊𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐫𝐚, 𝐍𝐄𝐗𝐓 𝐈𝐀𝐒 𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐈𝐑-𝟓𝟐 in the UPSC CSE 2020 examination.

Mock interviews are intended to judge the mental caliber of a candidate encompassing not only his/her intellectual capabilities but also social traits and his/her interest in current aﬀairs. Some of the qualities which are majorly judged are mental alertness, critical powers of assimilation, clear and logical exposition, the balance of judgment, variety and depth of interest, ability for social cohesion & leadership, intellectual and moral integrity.

NEXT IAS conducts an exclusive course known as “𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐞𝐰 𝐆𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞” under the guidance of 𝐁. 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐡 𝐒𝐢𝐫 (𝐄𝐱. 𝐈𝐄𝐒) 𝐂𝐌𝐃, 𝐌𝐀𝐃𝐄 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐩 and a panel of experts as soon as the result of CSE Mains Examination is declared.

The Interview Guidance board comprises highly competent and unbiased members, reputed subject matter and psychological experts headed by a Chairman, to assess the personnel suitability of the candidate for a career in public services. 

In this Video, we bring to you the mock interview of 𝐌𝐫. 𝐀𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐡 𝐊𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐫𝐚. We hope that this mock interview is helpful in achieving your aim.
